title: Felix Protocol | Hyperliquid, HIP-3 Markets, RWAs & HyperEVM
summary_title: Felix's 650M TVL strategy: RWA perps, spot equities, and mobile's distribution problem
summary_description: Charlie from Felix discusses lending infrastructure, commodity markets, tokenized equities via Ando, and why Hyperliquid needs to own mobile.

key_moments.label: Charlie's background: Antheus Labs risk firm, then Hyperliquid
Felix origin: from CDP protocol to vanilla lending on Morpho
650M TVL across products; launched commodity RWA perps in November
Strategy to bridge Hypercore and EVM: USDH-denominated markets
Launching commodity and equity markets: price feeds, leverage, risk parameterization
Ando partnership: 200+ tokenized equities day one, mint-redeem on ETH then EVM
Mobile is the perps onboarding choke point; Hyperliquid outsourced it to builders
2025 thesis: stablecoin growth will decouple from Bitcoin price, drive DeFi adoption

pull_quote: Perps will continue to be a retail-first product and capturing retail coming onto crypto will most likely happen at the mobile layer.
